title: Dish Washing Brushes, 3 Pcs Kitchen Silicone Sponges Scrubber Multi-functional Cleaning Scouring Brushes for Washing Vegetable Fruits Bowl Dish Pot Pan
features: 【High Quality Kitchen Silicone Sponges】- Food-grade silicone scrubber material; Wide temperature range design: From -60℃ to 230℃ (-76℉ to 500℉). Carry hot bowl or pot without hand burning.

【Ideal Kitchen Cleaning Brushes】- These silicone brushes are more for light washing; Soft and bendable enough to clean irregular kitchenware; Non-abrasive; Lightweight; Easy to clean and carry; Dishwasher safe and dry faster.

【Safe to Use】- Our double side sponges scoureres won't absorb water; Mildew free; Improve kitchen hygiene. With flexible and soft silicone bristles, easily reach the corners of irregular-shaped objects.

【Easy to Clean】- Simply rinse or put these dish scrubber brushes in dishwasher; Hanging loop design for convenient storage. With bright color and cute shape, silicone sponges are delightful kitchen decoration accessories.
【Multiple Function】 It is a very good choice for washing, you can use this silicone brush for washing dishes, plates, fruit, vegetable and so on
description: Product Description Multi-Use Modern Silicone Sponge Rinse thoroughly and squeeze sponge dry after each use. To further clean sponge, place in the dishwasher. NEW BRAND SILICONE DISH SPONGE The material itself is dishwashing in nature because it does not have pores. The silicone dish sponge are designed to be sponges kitchen or dish scrubber, it can be also used as pot holders. As body brush or something else: kitchen sponges is also soft enough to use in shower as a body brush, wash hand with silicone sponge. NEW DESIGN SILICONE DISH SPONGES Can be a makeup cleaning tool: It's useful to cleaning various makeup brushes. The quickest and most effective way to clean accumulated makeup, oil, off of your makeup brushes, you only need to use a little soap or shampoo to clean your silicone sponges, which prolongs their life. It has a hook out at the top, so you can hang the scrubber to dry. ✔ 100% non-stick, 100% food-grade dish sponge, Non-porous, Reusable ✔ Comfortable grip won't slip out of wet hands ✔ Easy to keep clean just rinse with dip in boiling water for few seconds, clean and store it anywhere using hang on hook design silicone sponge. ✔ Healthy, speedy natural drying, no deformation. ✔ Thick and soft bristles makes cleaning process very easy and comfortable. ✔ Heat-resistant dish sponges -76℉ to 500℉, to prevent your hands being burned and protect your table. ✔ Your pets on kitchen sponges, outdoor camping or bath scrubber, many kinds of convenient using way. It wipes away messes from nonstick cookware, countertops or any other surface with a finish you don't want to scratch. Just sanitize in the dishwasher and reuse! This soft scrub cleaning solution is great for washing dishes, cleaning bathrooms, and any household cleaning kit. This product is designed to be safe on most household surfaces. For delicate surfaces, test first on an inconspicuous area and allow to dry before general use. Silicone Sponges ACCURATE DESIGN:With a hook hole, quick dry. The shape of the bone makes the hand easier to control and more flexible to use.
